strengths: 15+ years across full-stack web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background
Current AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience aligns with role
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin and cloud platform depth (AWS/GCP/Azure)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may not transfer to primary stack

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited Kotlin/cloud signal

response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years and a strong fullstack profile with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and Docker, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP work at current role. Gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin are notable but learnable for a craftsmanship-oriented engineer with this depth and a clear TDD/testing track record.
